name: J Mascis
description: '''Joseph Donald Mascis Jr.''' (born December 10, 1965), better known as '''J Mascis''', is an American musician who is the singer, guitarist and main songwriter for the alternative rock band [[Dinosaur Jr.]] He has also released several albums as a solo artist and played drums and guitar on other projects. He was ranked number 74 in a ''[[Rolling Stone]]'' list of the "100 Greatest Guitarists", and number 5 in a similar list for ''[[Spin (magazine)|Spin]]'' magazine in 2012.
